name: PIXEL Go Credit Card
exclusions: Payment of card fees, interest, and charges

specialSpendRules.notes: Insurance spends capped at 2,000 CashPoints per day.
Utility spends capped at 2,000 CashPoints per calendar month.

milestoneBenefits: Joining fee waiver on spending ₹10,000 within 90 days of issuance
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver at fuel stations across India on transactions from ₹400 to ₹5,000, capped at ₹250 per statement cycle
Up to 10% savings on restaurant bill payments via Swiggy Dineout
FD-backed PIXEL Credit Card option through PayZapp
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Audited against official HDFC Bank PIXEL Go product page and terms on 2026-06-07.
CashPoints redemption is through the PayZapp app, with 1 CashPoint = ₹1, minimum redemption 1,000 points.
1.75% DCC markup fee applies on transactions processed in INR at international locations or with merchants registered overseas.
Fully digital onboarding and management via PayZapp.
Convert purchases into EMIs instantly via PayZapp.
EMI dashboard and reward tracking in PayZapp.
Interest-free credit period up to 50 days.
Contactless payments with Tap & Pay and Swipe to Pay.
Classified as cashback and PIXEL CashPoints (1:1 statement balance value) on 2026-06-25.
